name: im-not-ai-codex
description: Codex plugin for humanizing Japanese AI-written text with a Fast default mode and explicit strict subagent workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Remove Japanese AI-like texture while preserving meaning.
interface.longDescription: Humanize JP for Codex provides the humanize-japanese skill. Normal use runs a single-call Fast path; strict precision is available only when the user explicitly requests a Codex subagent workflow.
defaultPrompt: $humanize-japanese この日本語のAIっぽさを消して:
$humanize-japanese strict で精密検証しながら自然な日本語に整えて:
